metadata.rationale: Missing-value code 'UNK' -> null by mapping it explicitly alongside the real vocabulary; default flags only truly unexpected codes. (No null_if primitive exists.)
Genuine NaN passes through @handle_null unchanged; a blank input cell yields a blank output cell.
Numeric missing-value code -999 -> null via missing_code (identity-preserving: other readings pass through), then Scale passes the null through. The label is reported to the replay log.
